emails.subject: Re: NCPA
emails.body: Re: NCPA These deals have a contact name Don Imamura in them now. I asked Tracy Ngo, our credit person, about NCPA's credit status, and she said that since they've been done, it's now a matter of risk management or damage control if it should even come to that. At any rate, the deals are good and now have contact info. Thanks, kate From: Sharen Cason 02/08/2001 02:00 PM

emails.subject: NCPA
emails.body: There are 4 deals for Northern CA Power Agency and they have wonderful notes about confirming them together. However, I need a contact name, and isn't NCPA on the credit watch list? Thanks!
